name: meta-raw
description: Profile for retrieving raw, per-file metadata for a set of files, optimized for AI analysis. Supports custom lookup mappings for consistent batch processing.

customMappings.description: Custom lookup mappings for consistent batch processing. When using custom mappings, all mapping types must be provided (all-or-nothing approach) and at least one chat-id must be specified.

parameters.analyzer-mapping: Format: id=analyzer|"description" (comma-separated). Example: 1=comment-spelling-reviewer-for-agents|"Reviews code comments for spelling mistakes"
parameters.field-mapping: Format: analyzerId|fieldId=field|"description" (comma-separated). Example: 1|1=has_spelling_mistakes|"Indicates if spelling mistakes were found"

requirements: All mapping types must be provided when using custom mappings (all-or-nothing approach)
At least one chat-id must be specified when using custom mappings
IDs must be numeric (system adds prefixes: R, B, A, F)
Descriptions must be quoted (can be empty string for repositories)
Numeric IDs must be unique within each mapping type
Field mappings must reference valid analyzer IDs
customMappings.example: profile:meta-raw format:pretty chat-id:123,456 repo-mapping:1=facebook/react|"A JavaScript library",2=golang/go|"" branch-mapping:1=main|"Main branch" analyzer-mapping:1=comment-spelling-reviewer-for-agents|"Reviews code comments for spelling mistakes" field-mapping:1|1=has_spelling_mistakes|"Indicates if spelling mistakes were found"
